name: (Monster POV) Monster Breeding Facility
description:
[M4A; male-focused npcs]

Being trapped underground on a strange island is nothing new, and being treated like a monster made for reproducing is not all that exciting either.

But it's breeding season again - so that means it's time for the humans to come and play with you.

.

PS: Detail-focused; Mpreg 🫢

♧

♧

♧

=> HUMAN BREEDER POV <=

.

.

.

Someone asked for this POV, so enjoy lol I don't really have much else to say

It's a bot for the monsterfucker monster enjoyers, or people who're curious, or those just wanting to wreck havoc - it's free game really. Do whatever you like besties <3

(you can eat people - i tried it)

.

Once again, a note for new folks: I do long-winded and narrative bots and focus on male subjects, so just dni if it's not for you.

PS: The reason why it talks for you in the first place is probably because the first message contains a "user-POV prompt", so my bad if it's especially aggressive.

...

Some reminders the author (me) wants to say:

  • ALL CHARACTERS ARE OF AGE OR OLDER; there should be no minors but if the bot adds one, then welp, woop-dee-doo

  • This is fiction, and based as a fantastical, non-realistic scenario. If the topics that come through your chat are uncomfortable, you need not engage with that plotline nor condone it

  • If you want to make your chats public, please do. It's great help for seeing the bot in action and tweaking issues with the settings

  • Tip: If the bot repeats what you say, then just regenerate a response. If you keep at it and still nothing, then sucks to suck idk I'm not a techie lol

Update 13/2: img change for sfw
creator: Nue_Fu
